assets.intended_role: Mine Cards isolated icon source sheet candidate for first runtime icon proof
assets.observed_subject: 15 chunky voxel Mine Cards icons in a 4x4 source sheet with an empty final slot: mining, woodcutting, fishing, smithing, combat, farming, bank, shop, stone, copper ore, coins, pickaxe, locked, equipped, ready
problems: source is accepted for the first runtime icon proof, not final-art completion of the full UI family
some icons are object/building scale rather than compact 24px silhouettes; runtime screenshot must judge readability
